title: Panic Short Pass
description: Carrier is swarmed by two defenders. Early or low-power throw must create a nearby contested loose ball — not a safe clean pass.

expected_outcomes.description: Ball lands nearby as a loose ball with multiple players able to contest it.

must_not_outcomes.description: Ball reaches a teammate cleanly with no contest — panic throw should not produce a perfect result.
Carrier retains ball despite throw input — voluntary release must work.

notes: Throw power/arc must degrade meaningfully under pressure. The loose ball landing zone should be close enough for both teams to realistically contest.
